content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Applied all 4 pending amendments: (1) quoted the error value in the runtime log stage_failed message using Debug formatting ({:?}) so downstream key=value log parsers won't mis-parse on '=' characters in stderr content; (2-3) truncated stdout_error from extract_stdout_error() to STDERR_DETAIL_LIMIT (512 bytes) in both non-zero-exit error detail paths (stale-session retry and primary) to prevent unbounded result/errors[] fields from bloating run.ndjson; (4) added bounded stderr_tail and stderr_len/stdout_len to the 'Claude returned empty result' path, and added stdout_len/stderr_len to the Codex 'failed to read last-message file' transport-failure path, closing the last two decoder branches that lacked diagnostic context.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Change engine.rs runtime log format from error={} to error={:?} (Debug-quoted) so '=' characters in error content don't confuse key=value log parsers
2. [Completed] Truncate stdout_error with truncate_str(&out, STDERR_DETAIL_LIMIT) in the stale-session-retry exit-failure detail path (process_backend.rs ~line 1513)
3. [Completed] Truncate stdout_error with truncate_str(&out, STDERR_DETAIL_LIMIT) in the primary exit-failure detail path (process_backend.rs ~line 1555)
4. [Completed] Add bounded stderr_tail (STDERR_DETAIL_LIMIT) and stderr_len to the 'Claude returned empty result with no structured_output' error path (process_backend.rs ~line 227)
5. [Completed] Add stdout_len/stderr_len to the Codex 'failed to read last-message file' transport-failure error path (process_backend.rs ~line 334)
6. [Completed] Run cargo fmt, cargo test (757 pass, 0 fail), cargo clippy (0 new warnings in modified files), cargo fmt --check (clean)

## Validation Evidence

- 590 lib tests pass (0 regressions); all 6 diagnostic-specific tests pass
- 757 total tests pass across all test targets (0 failures)
- cargo fmt --check passes with no formatting issues
- cargo clippy shows 0 new warnings in modified files (engine.rs, process_backend.rs); only pre-existing #[cfg] inactive-code diagnostics from rust-analyzer

## Outstanding Risks

- Codex CLI has no equivalent --verbose flag; transient Codex failures still rely on captured stderr and runtime/failed/*.failed.raw artifacts for diagnosis
- Debug-quoted error value in runtime log adds surrounding double-quotes and escapes internal quotes; this is a cosmetic change to the log format that downstream tooling consuming run.ndjson may need to account for
